name: unlockshield-attestations
description: UnlockShield — Token Unlock Prediction & Hedge Attestation Indexer

deployment_notes.deploy_command: goldsky subgraph deploy unlockshield-attestations/v1 --from-abi --chain kite-ai-testnet --address CONTRACT_ADDRESS
deployment_notes.instant_subgraph: goldsky subgraph deploy unlockshield-attestations/v1 --from-abi contracts/UnlockShieldAttestation.sol --chain kite-ai-testnet

example_queries.all_predictions: { predictions(first: 100, orderBy: createdAt, orderDirection: desc) { id tokenSymbol riskScore predictedPriceImpact outcomeRecorded } }
example_queries.high_risk_only: { predictions(where: { riskScore_gte: 55 }) { id tokenSymbol riskScore reasoning hedgeActions { actionType details } } }
example_queries.agent_stats: { agentStats(id: "1") { totalPredictions accuratePredictions totalHedges totalValueProtected accuracyRate } }
example_queries.daily_activity: { dailySnapshots(first: 30, orderBy: date, orderDirection: desc) { date predictionsCreated hedgesExecuted totalValueProtected } }
example_queries.prediction_with_outcome: { predictions(where: { outcomeRecorded: true }) { id tokenSymbol predictedPriceImpact outcome { actualPriceImpact valueProtected predictionAccurate } } }
